testcase.name: test_bank_account_not_returned_in_plain

failure.message: AssertionError: bank_account_number_encrypted should NOT be in response assert 'bank_account_number_encrypted' not in {'account_holder_name': 'Test Enterprise Employee', 'address': '123 Test Street', 'attendance': [], 'audit_history': [{'action': 'create', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '8ee7d935-75b5-4e37-8175-dd8d35c9a625', ...}], ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_hr_enterprise_readiness.py:190: in test_bank_account_not_returned_in_plain assert "bank_account_number_encrypted" not in emp, "bank_account_number_encrypted should NOT be in response" E AssertionError: bank_account_number_encrypted should NOT be in response E assert 'bank_account_number_encrypted' not in {'account_holder_name': 'Test Enterprise Employee', 'address': '123 Test Street', 'attendance': [], 'audit_history': [{'action': 'create', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '8ee7d935-75b5-4e37-8175-dd8d35c9a625', ...}], ...}

testcase.name: test_update_bank_account_stores_encrypted

failure.message: AssertionError: Masked value should end with last 4 digits: XXXX XXXX XXXX 7654 assert ('9654' in 'XXXX XXXX XXXX 7654' or False) + where False = <built-in method endswith of str object at 0xfb6e70846330>('9654') + where <built-in method endswith of str object at 0xfb6e70846330> = 'XXXX XXXX XXXX 7654'.endswith

testcase.failure: tests/test_hr_enterprise_readiness.py:221: in test_update_bank_account_stores_encrypted assert "9654" in masked or masked.endswith("9654"), f"Masked value should end with last 4 digits: {masked}" E AssertionError: Masked value should end with last 4 digits: XXXX XXXX XXXX 7654 E assert ('9654' in 'XXXX XXXX XXXX 7654' or False) E + where False = <built-in method endswith of str object at 0xfb6e70846330>('9654') E + where <built-in method endswith of str object at 0xfb6e70846330> = 'XXXX XXXX XXXX 7654'.endswith

testcase.name: test_employee_list_no_encrypted_bank

failure.message: AssertionError: Employee Test Enterprise Employee has encrypted bank in list assert 'bank_account_number_encrypted' not in {'account_holder_name': 'Test Enterprise Employee', 'address': '123 Test Street', 'audit_count': 3, 'bank_account_number_encrypted': 'Z0FBQUFBQnBrR0NiVWFETHhpX0l6TDlKcVlUS0lnUTQ3Y28tUHUyWlI5MVVRM2xYZnJWZ0pwd2NkYk94ZTg0aUxtenN0QnFuY2c0LUl6d1UxTm5NQk5TY3lLbnZwMU5qNEIxWEQ0YTJDUzUzVk5SZDV2MTNCMk09', ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_hr_enterprise_readiness.py:234: in test_employee_list_no_encrypted_bank assert "bank_account_number_encrypted" not in emp, f"Employee {emp.get('name')} has encrypted bank in list" E AssertionError: Employee Test Enterprise Employee has encrypted bank in list E assert 'bank_account_number_encrypted' not in {'account_holder_name': 'Test Enterprise Employee', 'address': '123 Test Street', 'audit_count': 3, 'bank_account_number_encrypted': 'Z0FBQUFBQnBrR0NiVWFETHhpX0l6TDlKcVlUS0lnUTQ3Y28tUHUyWlI5MVVRM2xYZnJWZ0pwd2NkYk94ZTg0aUxtenN0QnFuY2c0LUl6d1UxTm5NQk5TY3lLbnZwMU5qNEIxWEQ0YTJDUzUzVk5SZDV2MTNCMk09', ...}

testcase.name: test_storage_service_exists

failure.message: Failed: Storage service not found: No module named 'services'

testcase.failure:
tests/test_hr_enterprise_readiness.py:358: in test_storage_service_exists from services.storage_service import get_storage_service E ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'services'
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_hr_enterprise_readiness.py:363: in test_storage_service_exists pytest.fail(f"Storage service not found: {e}") E Failed: Storage service not found: No module named 'services'

testcase.name: test_employee_api_excludes_sensitive_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Sensitive field 'bank_account_number_encrypted' should not be in response assert 'bank_account_number_encrypted' not in {'account_holder_name': 'Test Enterprise Employee', 'address': '123 Test Street', 'attendance': [], 'audit_history': [{'action': 'update', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '24b0e025-1280-42cc-9707-b3360e708fa8', ...}, {'action': 'update', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '88c03059-df41-47c2-8213-53e3c59ff6b4', ...}, {'action': 'update', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '5536bab1-ce82-41bd-911f-600a0546e03e', ...}, {'action': 'bank_details_update', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '8e6bb1ab-7449-413c-a83c-ed38003146aa', ...}, {'action': 'create', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '8ee7d935-75b5-4e37-8175-dd8d35c9a625', ...}], ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_hr_enterprise_readiness.py:380: in test_employee_api_excludes_sensitive_fields assert field not in emp, f"Sensitive field '{field}' should not be in response" E AssertionError: Sensitive field 'bank_account_number_encrypted' should not be in response E assert 'bank_account_number_encrypted' not in {'account_holder_name': 'Test Enterprise Employee', 'address': '123 Test Street', 'attendance': [], 'audit_history': [{'action': 'update', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '24b0e025-1280-42cc-9707-b3360e708fa8', ...}, {'action': 'update', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '88c03059-df41-47c2-8213-53e3c59ff6b4', ...}, {'action': 'update', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '5536bab1-ce82-41bd-911f-600a0546e03e', ...}, {'action': 'bank_details_update', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '8e6bb1ab-7449-413c-a83c-ed38003146aa', ...}, {'action': 'create', 'entity_id': '896f6893-2175-4328-a7ae-9031b08b7db9', 'entity_type': 'employee', 'id': '8ee7d935-75b5-4e37-8175-dd8d35c9a625', ...}], ...}

testcase.name: test_employee_list_excludes_sensitive_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: encrypted bank in employee list assert 'bank_account_number_encrypted' not in {'account_holder_name': 'Test Enterprise Employee', 'address': '123 Test Street', 'audit_count': 5, 'bank_account_number_encrypted': 'Z0FBQUFBQnBrR0NiVWFETHhpX0l6TDlKcVlUS0lnUTQ3Y28tUHUyWlI5MVVRM2xYZnJWZ0pwd2NkYk94ZTg0aUxtenN0QnFuY2c0LUl6d1UxTm5NQk5TY3lLbnZwMU5qNEIxWEQ0YTJDUzUzVk5SZDV2MTNCMk09', ...}
